children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than May 1 of each year, the Commission shall submit a report to the President, the Secretary of State, and Congress setting forth its recommendations for United States policy options based on its evaluations under .section 6432 of this title

children.heading: Classified form of report
children.label: b Classified form of report
children.text: The report may be submitted in classified form, together with a public summary of recommendations, if the classification of information would further the purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: Individual or dissenting views
children.label: c Individual or dissenting views
children.text: Each member of the Commission may include the individual or dissenting views of the member.
